events.event_description: First U.S. diplomatic representation in Finland established when Chargé d'Affaires pro tempore Alexander Richardson Magruder presented credentials, opening a legation-level mission.

evidence.quote: Alexander Richardson Magruder, Chargé d'Affaires pro tempore. Credentials presented: 1920-03-19. Superseded 1922-02-17. Note: Not commissioned; letter of credence dated March 13, 1920.

events.event_description: The United States severed diplomatic relations with Finland, ending all formal diplomatic representation.

evidence.quote: Edmund Asbury Gullion, Chargé d'Affaires ad interim. The United States severed diplomatic relations with Finland on 1944-06-30.

events.event_description: Diplomatic relations with Finland resumed when Chargé d'Affaires ad interim Benjamin Mayham Hulley presented credentials, re-establishing a legation-level mission.

evidence.quote: Benjamin Mayham Hulley, Chargé d'Affaires ad interim. Credentials presented: 1945-09-01.

events.event_description: The U.S. Legation in Helsinki was raised to Embassy status, elevating the highest level of U.S. diplomatic representation in Finland.

evidence.quote: The Legation in Helsinki was raised to Embassy status on September 10, 1954.
